  • Uses of ClientRemoteInterface in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.RMI

    Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.RMI that implement ClientRemoteInterface
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ClientVirtualView
    Client-side implementation of ClientRemoteInterface.
    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.RMI with parameters of type ClientRemoteInterface
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ServerRemoteInterface.addPlayer(PlayerDTO playerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Adds a player to the existing lobby.
    void
    ServerRemoteInterface.askForRank(String playerNumber, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Asks the server for the global leaderboard for the given player count.
    void
    ServerRemoteInterface.createGame(PlayerDTO playerHost, int PlayerNumber, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Creates a new game lobby with the given host player.
    void
    ServerRemoteInterface.joinGameLoaded(PlayerDTO player, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Joins an already-loaded game session as a reconnecting player.
    void
    ServerRemoteInterface.loadGame(PlayerDTO player, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Load a game if there is one

  • Uses of ClientRemoteInterface in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.Socket

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.Socket with parameters of type ClientRemoteInterface
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ServerSocketProxy.addPlayer(PlayerDTO playerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Sends a request to add the player to the current lobby.
    void
    ServerSocketProxy.askForRank(String playerNumber, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Sends the global leaderboard request to the server for the given player count.
    void
    ServerSocketProxy.createGame(PlayerDTO playerHost, int PlayerNumber, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Sends a request to create a new game.
    void
    ClientToServerMessage.execute(ServerRemoteInterface serverRemoteInterface, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling the appropriate method on the server interface.
    void
    ServerSocketProxy.joinGameLoaded(PlayerDTO player, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Sends a request to join a game that is already being loaded.
    void
    ServerSocketProxy.loadGame(PlayerDTO player, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Sends a request to load a saved game to the server.

  • Uses of ClientRemoteInterface in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.Socket.messages

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.Socket.messages with parameters of type ClientRemoteInterface
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    AddPlayerMessage.execute(ServerRemoteInterface serverRemoteInterface, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling ServerRemoteInterface.addPlayer(PlayerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface).
    void
    askForRankMessage.execute(ServerRemoteInterface serverRemoteInterface, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Executes the message by invoking ServerRemoteInterface.askForRank(String, ClientRemoteInterface) on the server, passing the player count and the client reference.
    void
    CreateGameMessage.execute(ServerRemoteInterface serverRemoteInterface, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling ServerRemoteInterface.createGame(PlayerDTO, int, ClientRemoteInterface).
    void
    JoinGameLoadedMessage.execute(ServerRemoteInterface serverRemoteInterface, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Executes the message by invoking ServerRemoteInterface.joinGameLoaded(PlayerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface) on the server.
    void
    LoadGameMessage.execute(ServerRemoteInterface serverRemoteInterface, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Executes the message by invoking ServerRemoteInterface.loadGame(PlayerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface) on the server.
    void
    PingMessage.execute(ServerRemoteInterface serverRemoteInterface, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling ServerRemoteInterface.ping(PlayerDTO).
    void
    PlacingPlayerMessage.execute(ServerRemoteInterface serverRemoteInterface, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling ServerRemoteInterface.placingPlayer(PlayerDTO, int).
    void
    PlayerDoNothingMessage.execute(ServerRemoteInterface serverRemoteInterface, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling ServerRemoteInterface.playerDoNothing(PlayerDTO).
    void
    SelectCardFromBottomListMessage.execute(ServerRemoteInterface serverRemoteInterface, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling ServerRemoteInterface.selectCardFromBottomList(PlayerDTO, CARD_TYPE, int).
    void
    SelectCardFromTopListMessage.execute(ServerRemoteInterface serverRemoteInterface, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling ServerRemoteInterface.selectCardFromTopList(PlayerDTO, CARD_TYPE, int).
    void
    SelectExtraCardMessage.execute(ServerRemoteInterface serverRemoteInterface, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling ServerRemoteInterface.selectExtraCard(PlayerDTO, CARD_TYPE, int).
    void
    SkipExtraDrawMessage.execute(ServerRemoteInterface serverRemoteInterface, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling ServerRemoteInterface.skipExtraDraw(PlayerDTO).

  • Uses of ClientRemoteInterface in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer that return ClientRemoteInterface
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ClientRemoteInterface
    ServerVirtualView.getClientStub()
    Returns the RMI stub or Socket proxy used to send notifications to the client.
    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer with parameters of type ClientRemoteInterface
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ServerVirtualView.reconnect(ClientRemoteInterface newStub, Runnable newDisconnectCallback)
    Swaps in a new client stub and restarts the executor so this view can be reused after the player reconnects.
    Constructors in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer with parameters of type ClientRemoteInterface
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    ServerVirtualView(ClientRemoteInterface clientStub, String nickname, Runnable disconnectCallback)
    Creates a new server virtual view instance.

  • Uses of ClientRemoteInterface in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.RMI

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.RMI with parameters of type ClientRemoteInterface
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ServerNetworkHandler.addPlayer(PlayerDTO playerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Adds a player to the existing Mesos lobby and registers their RMI stub.
    void
    ServerNetworkHandler.askForRank(String playerNumber, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Retrieves leaderboards from the database for all player-count configurations from 2 up to the given number, and sends them to the requesting client via ClientRemoteInterface.sendRank(Map).
    void
    ServerNetworkHandler.createGame(PlayerDTO playerHost, int playerNumber, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Creates a new Mesos game lobby hosted by the given player.
    void
    ServerNetworkHandler.handleSocketClientDisconnection(ClientRemoteInterface proxy)
    Called by SocketClientHandler when a socket client's stream drops.
    void
    ServerNetworkHandler.joinGameLoaded(PlayerDTO playerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Allows a player to rejoin a game that is being loaded, after the first player has invoked ServerNetworkHandler.loadGame(PlayerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface).
    void
    ServerNetworkHandler.loadGame(PlayerDTO playerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Starts loading a saved game from disk.

  • Uses of ClientRemoteInterface in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket

    Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket that implement ClientRemoteInterface
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ClientSocketProxy
    Proxy for ClientRemoteInterface over a Socket connection, allowing the server to treat a Socket client as an RMI stub.
    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket with parameters of type ClientRemoteInterface
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ServerToClientMessage.execute(ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling the appropriate method on the client interface.

  • Uses of ClientRemoteInterface in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages with parameters of type ClientRemoteInterface
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    SendRankMessage.execute(ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Delivers this message to the client by invoking ClientRemoteInterface.sendRank(Map) with the leaderboards.

  • Uses of ClientRemoteInterface in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.boardMessaes

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.boardMessaes with parameters of type ClientRemoteInterface
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    BoardInitializeMessages.execute(ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling ClientRemoteInterface.boardInitialize(List, List).
    void
    OrderOnDefaultTileMessage.execute(ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling ClientRemoteInterface.orderOnDefaultTile(List).
    void
    PlayerPlacedOnOffertileMessage.execute(ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling ClientRemoteInterface.playerPlacedOnOffertile(String, int).

  • Uses of ClientRemoteInterface in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.drawOneMoreCard

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.drawOneMoreCard with parameters of type ClientRemoteInterface
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    AskExtraDrawMessage.execute(ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Delivers this message to the client by invoking ClientRemoteInterface.askExtraDraw(List, List) with the end-of-turn market snapshot.

  • Uses of ClientRemoteInterface in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.gameMessages

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.gameMessages with parameters of type ClientRemoteInterface
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ActionAvailableChangedMessage.execute(ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling ClientRemoteInterface.actionAvailableChanged(ActionDTO).
    void
    EraChangedMessage.execute(ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling ClientRemoteInterface.eraChanged(ERA).
    void
    ErrorMessage.execute(ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling ClientRemoteInterface.showErrorMessage(String).
    void
    GamePhaseChangedMessage.execute(ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling ClientRemoteInterface.gamePhaseChanged(GAME_PHASE).
    void
    GameWinnersMessage.execute(ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling ClientRemoteInterface.gameWinners(List).
    void
    InitializeGameMessage.execute(ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling ClientRemoteInterface.initializeGame(ERA, GAME_PHASE, String, String).
    void
    PlayerAddedMessage.execute(ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling ClientRemoteInterface.playerAdded(PlayerDTO).
    void
    PlayerDisconnectedMessage.execute(ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling ClientRemoteInterface.playerDisconnected(String).
    void
    PlayerReconnectedMessage.execute(ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling ClientRemoteInterface.playerReconnected(String).
    void
    PlayerToPlaceChangedMessage.execute(ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling ClientRemoteInterface.playerToPlaceChanged(PlayerDTO).
    void
    PlayerToPlayChangedMessage.execute(ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Dispatches this message by calling ClientRemoteInterface.playerToPlayChanged(PlayerDTO).
    void
    PongMessage.execute(ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
     
    void
    ResolvedEventMessage.execute(ClientRemoteInterface clientRemoteInterface)
    Delivers this message to the client by invoking ClientRemoteInterface.eventResolved(int, EVENT_TYPE) with the event ID and type.
